verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Somebody loves me, answers my prayer, I love somebody, I know He cares. Somebody tells me not to repine, That somebody is Jesus, and I know He's mine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You'll be happy if you will let Jesus have His way, He has work for us all to do every passing day: Feed the hungry and cheer the sad, for the sinner pray. You'll have joy that you've never had, and you then can say:

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Somebody loves me, answers my prayer, I love somebody, I know He cares. Somebody tells me not to repine, That somebody is Jesus, and I know He's mine, That somebody is Jesus, and I know He's mine.
